sourcePrompt: A PCF "Swift Boat" coastal patrol craft, about fifteen meters of welded aluminum, all straight lines. A boxy hull with a vertical bow leads to a two-level deckhouse amidships: an enclosed pilothouse with rectangular windows below, and an open gun tub on its roof mounting twin .50 caliber machine guns. The long aft deck carries a combined mortar and machine-gun mount near the stern. Gray-green metal, sturdy, angular and workmanlike.
